title: Shri Brahmacharini Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Brahmacharini Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Brahmacharini.
description:
Jai Ambe Brahmacharini Mata,
Jai chaturbhuj priya sukh daata.
Brahma ji ke man bhati ho,
Gyan sabhi ko sikhlati ho॥
॥ Jai Brahmacharini Mata ॥

Brahm mantra hai jaap tumhara,
Jisko jape sakal sansara.
Jai Gayatri Ved ki mata,
Jo man nis din tumhein dhyata॥
॥ Jai Brahmacharini Mata ॥

Kami koi rehne na paye,
Koi bhi dukh darad na sataye.
Jiski kripa drishti jag par ho,
Uski kismat sada hi sanvaro॥
॥ Jai Brahmacharini Mata ॥

Brahmacharini ji ki mahima aparmpar,
Tum hi tarini bhav sagar paar.
Jo bhi teri sharan mein aaye,
Seedhe moksha ka marg paaye॥
॥ Jai Brahmacharini Mata ॥

Brahma ka roop ho tum kalyani,
Brahmacharini daya ki rani॥
॥ Jai Brahmacharini Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the main significance of performing Maa Brahmacharini's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed to seek penance, self-restraint, wisdom, and renunciation. Maa Brahmacharini is the goddess of knowledge and provides determination to her devotees.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for her worship?
faq.a2: The second day of Navratri (Dwitiya) is considered the most auspicious for worshipping Maa Brahmacharini.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for Mother Brahmacharini during Aarti?
faq.a3: She is fond of Mishri (sugar candy), Panchamrit, and sweets made of milk.
faq.q4: Can her Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, it can be performed with full devotion before her idol or picture in the home temple on the second day of Navratri.
faq.q5: Which mantra should be chanted after the Aarti?
faq.a5: Chanting 'Om Brahmacharinyai Namah' after the Aarti is the best practice for peace of mind, concentration, and spiritual growth.
